reviews: Pure luxury from start to finish. My stylist understood exactly what I wanted and delivered perfection.
Finally found a salon that truly listens. Every visit feels like self-care, not just a haircut.
The atmosphere is serene, the team is talented, and the results speak for themselves.
description: Hawthorn Salon is a sanctuary for self-care and style. Our expert stylists combine artistry with the finest products to create looks that are uniquely you. Experience beauty at its finest.
